skills.principle: When several same-class candidates are plausible, rank them by smaller y-center before size or salience.
skills.when_to_apply: Use for questions asking for the upper or northern instance of an object.
skills.avoid: Do not select a lower but larger or more visually salient instance.

skills.principle: When several same-class candidates are plausible, rank them by larger y-center before size or salience.
skills.when_to_apply: Use for questions asking for the lower or southern instance of an object.
skills.avoid: Do not select an upper but larger or more central instance.

skills.principle: When several same-class candidates are plausible, rank them by smaller x-center before size or salience.
skills.when_to_apply: Use for questions asking for the left or western instance of an object.
skills.avoid: Do not select a more central instance if a plausible leftmost candidate exists.

skills.principle: When several same-class candidates are plausible, rank them by larger x-center before size or salience.
skills.when_to_apply: Use for questions asking for the right or eastern instance of an object.
skills.avoid: Do not select a more central instance if a plausible rightmost candidate exists.

skills.coordinate_prior: satisfy both x and y directions
skills.principle: For corner locators, satisfy the vertical and horizontal coordinate priors together before judging salience.
skills.when_to_apply: Use when a question combines vertical and horizontal locator words.
skills.avoid: Do not stop after satisfying only one axis of a corner instruction.
